content: An ICM curiosity-driven 2025 autonomous agent can prune and expand its Tree of Thoughts exploration dynamically by treating each thought branch as an under-explored state for intrinsic reward calculation, prioritizing branching paths that reduce prediction uncertainty instead of brute-force searching all nodes. This creates a curiosity-guided self-pruning search tree that converges to high-value solutions much faster than uniform breadth or depth-based exploration.
